---
name: Voice / TTS Issue
about: Wrong voice, truncated audio, bad pronunciation, or edge-tts errors
title: ''
labels: tts
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the issue
What's wrong with the generated audio?

- [ ] Wrong or unexpected voice
- [ ] Audio cuts off mid-chapter
- [ ] Mispronounced words
- [ ] edge-tts error / connection failure
- [ ] Other: ___

## Command used
```
speak-epub [your flags here] book.epub
```

## Voice being used
<!-- Run: speak-epub --list-voices to find the exact name -->
Voice name: `en-GB-RyanNeural` *(or whichever)*

## Error output (if any)
```
paste here
```

## Environment
- OS:
- Python version:
- edge-tts version: <!-- pip show edge-tts -->
- Network: <!-- any proxy, VPN, or firewall that might affect edge-tts? -->

## Additional context
Language of the book, any unusual characters or markup in the chapter text, etc.
